title: Introduction to Spectral Graph Neural Networks
excerpt: An overview of spectral-domain approaches to graph neural networks, covering the transition from graph signal processing to learnable polynomial filters.

title: CLASH: Cross-Relation Adaptive Spectral Heterogeneous GNN
excerpt: A spectral GNN framework for heterogeneous graphs using node-adaptive eigenvalue perturbation, analytically equivalent to polynomial coefficient transformation via the binomial theorem.

title: GraphLLM Robustness Under Noisy Graph Data
excerpt: Exploring the robustness of LLM-enhanced GNNs when graph structure and text attributes are noisy, with a unified scoring mechanism based on text-structure semantic consistency.
